description:
A suite of design, analysis and management tools to drive your IT project development and digital transformation.


Visual Paradigm 17.2 introduces a number of new features, which includes:
- Introducing the ability to maintain multiple project browsers with Project Publisher
- Enhanced web diagram import: Added support for 10+ new types
- Supported Exasol in database generation and reversal
- Supported Teradata in database generation and reversal
- Supported AWS Athena in database generation and reversal
- Added support for Change Request management in team collaboration

Enhancements of Visual Paradigm 17.2 includes:
- Supported PostgreSQL 15 for VP Server database
- Added collapse all/expansion all functionality in matrix
- Enabled selecting the tagged value(s) to display on a shape
- Streamlined project and folder management in Visual Paradigm Server
- Updated Visual Paradigm Server infrastructure
- Improved data retrieval in Doc. Composer with recursive support
- Enhanced rule extraction in Doc. Composer

Bug fixes of Visual Paradigm 17.2 includes:
- Resolved failure to reverse PostgreSQL DDL file
- Addressed a reference between models not being covered in Excel export/import
- Fixed conflicted data not being shown in the conflict resolution window
- Corrected a page error in the project browser published by Project Publisher
- Fixed missing domain type for column in a logical entity created by 'duplicate'
- Resolved an error when generating Swagger
- Addressed an account activation issue for Teamwork Server with SSL and Okta integration
- Fixed visualized connector being wrongly set as master view
- Corrected DPI setting for export web diagram from VP desktop not working
- Addressed varchar(max) becoming varchar(255) when reverse SQL Server DDL
- Resolved Project browser (produced by Project Publisher) not following 'Show stereotype icon for model elements in tree' option
- Fixed an error in undo/redo
- Addressed BPMN shapes growing when toggling 'show tagged values'
- Corrected Gantt chart image not correctly exported
- Fixed failure to show Configure Database window
- Resolved Reverse DDL failed to handle Temporal table
- Fixed missing map tagged values back to stereotype when importing model from XML
- Addressed missing FK Column worksheet when exporting ERD to Excel under Model Element tab
- Corrected failure to import Excel export from logical ERD
- Fixed ETL table wrongly handling >= as >
- Disallowed removing web diagram palette in VP Desktop
- Moved the lock button for Scrum Canvas
- Resolved slow dockable panes on Mac
- Fixed UI flash when showing spec dialog & PostMania pane
- Addressed several usability issues in Decision Table
- Corrected glossary term links not working in published website
- Fixed Java null pointer exception when generating Update Database
- Resolved incorrect pool and lane structure in RACI Chart
- Addressed problem with teamwork functionality through proxy
- Fixed reference model in grid not showing in fully qualified name
- Resolved inability to delete a member if she is involved in PostMania
